texto: We must treat with respect our world and all upon it. Túwaqachi is not inherited from our ancestors
autor: it has been loaned to us by our children.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it has been loaned to us by our children. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We must treat with respect our world and all upon it. Túwaqachi is not inherited from our ancestors” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, p-j-parker, treat, útil em momentos de reflexao.
